overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima showing a samurai in red armor walking from a traditional Japanese village through a forested shrine path, ascending stone stairs, and approaching a sacred pink tree. The scene features bright spring lighting with falling cherry blossoms and traditional wooden architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: traditional village courtyard with wooden buildings

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the village courtyard toward the wooden entrance gate, passing traditional buildings and blooming cherry trees

entered.detail: traditional Japanese wooden structures with tiled roofs lining the courtyard
massive cherry blossom tree with white-pink blooms dominating the courtyard center
paved stone ground with scattered cherry blossom petals
traditional wooden gate marking the entrance to the forest path ahead

segments.scene_description: The samurai walks through a sunlit village courtyard surrounded by traditional wooden buildings, with a massive white cherry blossom tree blooming overhead. The stone-paved ground is scattered with petals as the character approaches a wooden gate at the courtyard's end.

events.description: passing through wooden gate from village courtyard into dense forested area

agents.ego_description: continuing along the forest dirt path, passing stone lanterns and dense foliage on both sides

entered.detail: tall pine and deciduous trees forming a dense forest canopy
narrow dirt trail winding through the forest with dappled sunlight
traditional stone lanterns lining the path edges

segments.scene_description: Passing through the wooden gate, the environment transitions into a dense forest with a narrow dirt trail. Stone lanterns line the path as sunlight filters through the canopy, and the village buildings disappear behind as the forest encloses the path.

events.description: beginning to ascend the stone staircase winding up through the forest

agents.ego_description: climbing the uneven stone stairs that wind upward through the forest, with large rocks and roots visible alongside the path

entered.detail: weathered stone steps forming a steep staircase ascending the hillside
large boulders covered in moss flanking the staircase

segments.scene_description: The dirt path transitions to a steep stone staircase ascending through the forest. Large moss-covered rocks flank the steps as the character climbs steadily upward, with the forest canopy forming a dense overhead cover.

scene_state.functional_zone: shrine approach with multiple torii gates

events.description: reaching the top of stairs and entering sacred shrine grounds marked by wooden torii gates
passing through a second large torii gate deeper into the shrine complex

agents.ego_description: walking through the sacred shrine path, passing under multiple wooden torii gates and stone lanterns

entered.detail: traditional wooden torii gates with sacred ropes marking the shrine entrance
weathered wooden fences defining the shrine grounds boundaries

segments.scene_description: At the top of the stairs, the character enters a sacred shrine area defined by multiple wooden torii gates. Stone lanterns line the cobblestone path as the character passes through the gates, transitioning from wild forest to maintained sacred grounds.

scene_state.functional_zone: sacred tree avenue with fenced path

events.description: approaching the magnificent sacred pink tree visible at the end of the fenced avenue
transitioning from walking to running toward the sacred tree

agents.ego_description: walking then running down the final avenue toward the massive pink tree, with the ocean visible in the distance beyond

entered.detail: massive sacred tree with vibrant pink foliage glowing in the sunlight at the path's end
tall wooden fences lining both sides of the final approach
distant view of the ocean visible beyond the sacred tree

segments.scene_description: The path narrows into an avenue lined with wooden fences, leading toward a magnificent sacred pink tree glowing in the distance. As the character approaches, the ocean becomes visible beyond the tree, and the movement transitions from walking to running in the final moments.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a sunlit village courtyard into a dense forest and finally ascends toward a sacred coastal shrine. It begins amidst traditional wooden buildings under a massive white cherry blossom tree, moving across petal-strewn stone toward a wooden gate. As the camera passes through the gate, the open courtyard gives way to a narrow dirt trail lined with stone lanterns, where the village disappears behind a closing canopy of forest greenery. The scene then shifts as the dirt path becomes a steep stone staircase flanked by mossy rocks, climbing upward until the wild forest opens into a maintained sacred area marked by a series of wooden torii gates. Finally, the path narrows between wooden fences and leads toward a glowing pink sacred tree, with the horizon expanding to reveal the ocean as the character breaks into a run.
